title: Bare Bones x Enchanted Books
description: Retextures the Enchanted Books to match the Bare Bones Resourse Pack
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f6586ff4e1ca486385f615ceccda90c7acf62f.png)

Requires [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EnchantedBookEnabler](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantedbookenabler-datapack)
______________
USAGE IN MODPACKS
Sure, but give credit by name and link to this project
________
Thanks, and have fun
